name: Riso Al Basilico in Forma (Basil Rice)
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Tomatoes, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 quarts of lightly salted water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Add the rice and cook for approximately 18 minutes, or until the rice is al dente and firm to the bite. Do not overcook.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Pour into a colander and gently toss to remove excess water.
4. Place hot rice in a large mixing bowl. Add basil and cheese. Stir gently to combine.
5. Add olive oil and toss thoroughly. Season with salt.
6. Spoon the mixture into a 2-quart mold and press gently to set.
7. Immediately unmold the rice onto a large serving platter.
8. Garnish with tomato wedges and parsley sprigs.
